creator: sarawgi.aditya@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

I have the same device and it works fine for me on BETA2.

My uname -a 
FreeBSD aditya 8.0-BETA2 FreeBSD 8.0-BETA2 #1: Wed Jul 29 14:53:10 IST 2009  aditya@aditya:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  i386


pciconf -lv:
re0@pci0:7:0:0: class=0x020000 card=0x02731028 chip=0x816810ec rev=0x02 
hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Realtek Semiconductor'
    device     = 'Gigabit Ethernet NIC(NDIS 6.0) (RTL8168/8111)'
    class      = network
    subclass   = ethernet
